items.name: multi-select
items.title: Multi Select
items.description: Chip-based multi-select with command-palette dropdown, search, select-all and async loader. Compound and single-prop APIs.

items.name: number-range
items.title: Number Range
items.description: Two-thumb slider paired with synced number inputs. Min/max/step, currency or unit formatting, keyboard-first.

items.name: year-picker
items.title: Year Picker
items.description: Decade-grid year picker with keyboard nav, min/max bounds, single or range mode.

items.name: tag-input
items.title: Tag Input
items.description: Chip input with paste-to-split, dedupe, validation hook, max tags. Compound and single-prop APIs.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Searchable select on Base UI: single or multiple selection, chips, grouped options, an input addon slot and a clear button.

items.name: lazy-select
items.title: Lazy Select
items.description: Autocomplete single-select that defers loading until open and pages through results on scroll. Debounced server-side search with a pluggable lazy paginator hook.

items.name: password-input
items.title: Password Input
items.description: Show/hide toggle with an optional pluggable strength meter. Compound and single-prop APIs.

items.name: currency-input
items.title: Currency Input
items.description: Locale-aware grouping with currency-symbol prefix and configurable decimal precision.

items.name: phone-input
items.title: Phone Input
items.description: Country dial-code dropdown with E.164 output. Compound and single-prop APIs.

items.name: file-dropzone
items.title: File Dropzone
items.description: Drag-drop + click upload zone with previews, accept and max-size validation. Compound and single-prop APIs.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat Card
items.description: Compact metric card with label, value, and an up/down/flat trend chip. Compound and single-prop APIs.

items.name: rating
items.title: Rating
items.description: Star rating with hover preview, half-star precision, read-only mode and sm / md / lg sizes.

items.name: timeline
items.title: Timeline
items.description: Vertical event timeline with default or icon dots, tone variants and labelled time / title / description parts.

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: 3D tactile keycap with hover lift and pressed states. Compound API with KbdGroup for chords and KbdDisplay for inline keys.

items.name: callout
items.title: Callout
items.description: MDX-style admonition with info / success / warning / error / neutral variants and optional icon override. Ships --info / --success / --warning theme tokens.

items.name: scroll-progress
items.title: Scroll Progress
items.description: Fixed reading progress bar. Tracks document scroll by default or a scoped container ref.

items.name: hero-01
items.title: Hero 1
items.description: Full-bleed hero card over an animated light-beam shader, with a glass pill nav, a trust badge, a serif headline, dual CTA and a three-stat footer.

items.name: hero-02
items.title: Hero 2
items.description: Centered hero over animated grayscale gradient bars, with a live pill, a serif headline with an underlined accent, dual CTA and a wordmark strip.

items.name: hero-03
items.title: Hero 3
items.description: Editorial centered hero on a faded grid, with a serif headline, sub-copy, dual CTA and a logo cloud of customer wordmarks.

items.name: hero-04
items.title: Hero 4
items.description: Full-bleed image-banner hero with a dark scrim, a slim nav, a serif headline and dual CTA aligned to the bottom.

items.name: hero-05
items.title: Hero 5
items.description: Full-bleed hero card over an animated aurora shader, with a glass pill nav, a glass content panel, a serif headline, dual CTA and an avatar social-proof row.

items.name: feature-01
items.title: Feature 1
items.description: Three alternating feature rows, each pairing a stylized Tailwind-only mock UI with a copy column (eyebrow, headline, paragraph, 3-item checklist).

items.name: feature-02
items.title: Feature 2
items.description: Section header above a 3-column, 2-row grid of bordered feature cards with lucide icons, headlines and short blurbs.

items.name: pricing-01
items.title: Pricing 1
items.description: Three-tier card row with a featured middle plan. Each card lists price, blurb, feature checklist and a primary or outline CTA.

items.name: pricing-02
items.title: Pricing 2
items.description: Compare-by-feature pricing table with sticky tier header (tier name, price, CTA) and ~8 feature rows below.

items.name: testimonial-01
items.title: Testimonial 1
items.description: Centered single quote with stylized open-mark, author block (avatar, name, role, company) and a muted wordmark row below.

items.name: testimonial-02
items.title: Testimonial 2
items.description: Masonry quote grid (CSS columns) with ~6 bordered quote cards of varying length and author rows.

items.name: cta-01
items.title: CTA 1
items.description: Framed CTA card with corner marks, headline + sub-copy on the left, dual buttons stacked on the right.

items.name: cta-02
items.title: CTA 2
items.description: Full-bleed centered CTA with framing top/bottom rules, highlight underlay on the key word, and an inline install command.

items.name: cta-03
items.title: CTA 3
items.description: Full-bleed CTA card with an animated dithered shader backdrop, a live status pill, a serif headline and a pill action button.

items.name: faq-01
items.title: FAQ 1
items.description: Two-column FAQ: sticky heading + contact card on the left, numbered accordion on the right.

items.name: faq-02
items.title: FAQ 2
items.description: Centered heading with two-column accordion grid below. Each row tagged with a Qn index.

items.name: faq-03
items.title: FAQ 3
items.description: Searchable FAQ with category tabs, a live-filtered accordion, an empty state for missed queries and a support CTA strip.

items.name: faq-04
items.title: FAQ 4
items.description: Framed single-column FAQ with side rules, a centered display header, five topic groups each pairing a heading with its own accordion, and a support footer line.

items.name: login-01
items.title: Login 1
items.description: Centered login card with monogram, email + password (using the password-input component), remember-me, divider and GitHub / Google providers.

items.name: login-02
items.title: Login 2
items.description: Two-pane login: form on the left, dark testimonial panel with quote and metrics on the right. Uses the strength-meter variant of password-input.

items.name: signup-01
items.title: Signup 1
items.description: Centered signup card with monogram, name + email, strength-meter password-input, terms checkbox, divider and GitHub / Google providers. Validates inline on submit.

items.name: forgot-password-01
items.title: Forgot Password 1
items.description: Centered reset-request card: email with inline validation and a pending submit, swapping to a check-your-inbox state that echoes the address with resend and back-to-sign-in links.

items.name: otp-verify-01
items.title: OTP Verify 1
items.description: Centered verification card with a six-box code input built in the block: auto-advance, backspace, paste distribution and arrow-key focus, plus a 30s resend countdown and a pending → success verify flow.

items.name: header-01
items.title: Header 1
items.description: Sticky top nav with brand monogram, centered anchor links, dual auth CTAs and a slide-down mobile menu.

items.name: footer-01
items.title: Footer 1
items.description: Brand + tagline column alongside Product / Company / Resources link columns, with a copyright row and social icons below a thin rule.

items.name: not-found-01
items.title: Not Found 1
items.description: Centered 404 with mono eyebrow, display headline, paired CTAs and a 'try one of these' suggested-routes list.

items.name: month-picker
items.title: Month Picker
items.description: 4×3 month grid with year stepper, keyboard nav, min/max bounds, single or range mode.

items.name: time-picker
items.title: Time Picker
items.description: Hour, minute and optional second scroll columns with 12/24h modes, step intervals and keyboard nav.

items.name: color-picker
items.title: Color Picker
items.description: SV gradient + hue slider with HEX / RGB / HSL tabs, eyedropper (where supported) and recent swatches.

items.name: avatar-stack
items.title: Avatar Stack
items.description: Overlapping avatar group with size (sm/md/lg) and spacing (tight/normal/loose) variants, image or fallback support, numeric overflow chip, and asChild on items/overflow so each avatar can render as a link or button.

items.name: announcement-bar
items.title: Announcement Bar
items.description: Top-of-page banner with default / primary / muted tones, optional dismiss button and localStorage persistence.

items.name: logo-cloud-01
items.title: Logo Cloud 1
items.description: Centered eyebrow + headline above a 5-column bordered wordmark grid, with stat strip and case-study link below.

items.name: contact-01
items.title: Contact 1
items.description: Production contact form with controlled state, inline validation, character counter, topic select, consent checkbox and a pending/sent state machine. Channel list and remote-location card alongside.

items.name: blog-01
items.title: Blog 1
items.description: Editorial blog index with a featured post on top and a 4-column grid of post cards underneath. Built on Card and Badge.

items.name: ecommerce-01
items.title: E-commerce 1
items.description: Product grid with category filter pills, sale and new badges, wishlist toggles, star ratings, compare-at pricing and per-card add buttons.

items.name: ecommerce-02
items.title: E-commerce 2
items.description: Shopping cart with quantity steppers, removable line items, promo-code validation, a free-shipping threshold, live totals and an empty-cart state.

items.name: dashboard-01
items.title: Dashboard 1
items.description: Operations dashboard with Tabs date-range switcher (1d / 7d / 30d / 90d), 4-up metric strip, weekly bar chart and a recent-activity feed. Data switches live with the range.

items.name: dashboard-02
items.title: Dashboard 2
items.description: Analytics dashboard with a date-range select, four sparkline KPI tiles, a layered two-series area chart, and top-pages and channel-share side cards.

items.name: dashboard-03
items.title: Dashboard 3
items.description: Revenue dashboard with a month stepper, plan-mix donut and legend, invoice status list and a transactions table with status dots and a pagination footer.

items.name: dashboard-04
items.title: Dashboard 4
items.description: Commerce operations dashboard in a card-in-card style: four inset stat tiles, a Today band pairing an hourly two-series revenue chart with ad-budget and peak-hours cards, and a week-in-review band with an orders bar chart and three sparkline metric cards driven by a range select.

items.name: dashboard-05
items.title: Dashboard 5
items.description: Observability dashboard composed as one bordered lattice: greeting strip with range select, four sparkline KPI cells, cache and duration chart cells, an AI-insight callout, a P50/P95/P99 latency distribution and an active-deployments list with ping-dot statuses.

items.name: integrations-01
items.title: Integrations 1
items.description: Two-column integrations section with copy and feature list on the left, orbit diagram (central hub + 7 logo spokes connected by dashed rays) on the right.

items.name: image-gallery-01
items.title: Image Gallery 1
items.description: Studio-style masonry gallery with Tabs-driven category filter, real photo tiles via next/image, varied aspect ratios, hover zoom + arrow chip and an Empty fallback for empty filters.

items.name: app-shell-01
items.title: App Shell 1
items.description: Drop-in admin shell layout built on the shadcn Sidebar primitive: collapsible icon-rail sidebar with nav badges and a footer profile row, sticky topbar with breadcrumb, command-palette search and notification button, plus a live-filtering accounts table in the main area.

items.name: app-shell-02
items.title: App Shell 2
items.description: Sidebar-free admin shell with a sticky top navigation bar (logo, primary links, search and avatar) over a settings layout: an in-page vertical nav switches a detail card of definition-list fields with per-field edit actions.

items.name: app-shell-03
items.title: App Shell 3
items.description: Split-pane inbox shell: icon rail with unread indicator, searchable conversation list with an unread filter, and a reading pane with star toggle and a reply composer that appends to the thread.

items.name: app-shell-04
items.title: App Shell 4
items.description: Starter shell on the shadcn Sidebar primitive (inset variant): workspace switcher and ⌘K search in the rail, icon-collapsible nav with tooltips, an inset header with trigger, notification count and avatar, and a welcome heading over dashed placeholder slots.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Loading indicator with circle, dots and bars variants, sm / md / lg sizes. Inherits the current text color and ships an accessible status label.

items.name: copy-button
items.title: Copy Button
items.description: Click-to-copy button with copied feedback, icon-only or labelled, ghost / outline variants and a non-secure-context clipboard fallback.

items.name: marquee
items.title: Marquee
items.description: Infinite scrolling row or column for logos and testimonials, with pause-on-hover, reverse and vertical modes. Keyframes ship inline, zero config.

items.name: tree-view
items.title: Tree View
items.description: Collapsible nested tree for file explorers and hierarchical data, with auto folder/file icons, depth indentation, selection and keyboard focus.

items.name: animated-number
items.title: Animated Number
items.description: Count-up number that tweens to its target with easing, Intl formatting (currency, compact, percent), prefix/suffix and reduced-motion support.

items.name: stepper
items.title: Stepper
items.description: Multi-step progress indicator with horizontal and vertical orientation, completed / active / inactive states, clickable steps and a compound API.

items.name: sortable
items.title: Sortable
items.description: Drag-to-reorder list with pointer and keyboard sorting, handle or whole-item dragging, and live-region announcements. No dnd-kit.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date Picker
items.description: Single-date picker with month grid, keyboard nav, min/max bounds and disabled dates. Includes an inline DateCalendar, no date library.

items.name: date-range-picker
items.title: Date Range Picker
items.description: Dual-month range picker with hover preview, presets, min/max bounds and keyboard nav. Includes an inline DateRangeCalendar, no date library.

items.name: mention-input
items.title: Mention Input
items.description: @-mention textarea with caret-anchored autocomplete, highlighted mention chips, async search and multiple trigger characters.

items.name: rich-text-editor
items.title: Rich Text Editor
items.description: Tiptap editor with a formatting toolbar (headings, lists, links, highlight, alignment) and a hover bubble to edit or unlink links inline. Outputs HTML, controlled or uncontrolled, with composable parts.
items.docs: Pulls in Tiptap's editor engine (seven @tiptap/* packages) — expect a heavier bundle than the other input components.

items.name: inline-edit
items.title: Inline Edit
items.description: Click-to-edit text with preview, validation, async submit and confirm/cancel controls. Input and textarea modes.

items.name: signature-pad
items.title: Signature Pad
items.description: Canvas signature capture with velocity-based ink, per-stroke undo, theme-aware re-inking and PNG/JPEG export via ref.

items.name: image-cropper
items.title: Image Cropper
items.description: Pan-and-zoom image cropper with rect or round mask, fixed aspect frame, pinch / wheel / keyboard control and canvas export via ref.

items.name: image-compare
items.title: Image Compare
items.description: Before/after comparison slider with a draggable, keyboard-accessible divider, horizontal or vertical orientation and hover-follow mode.

items.name: lightbox
items.title: Lightbox
items.description: Fullscreen image lightbox on Radix Dialog with gallery navigation, zoom and pan, swipe gestures, captions and a thumbnail strip.

items.name: countdown-timer
items.title: Countdown Timer
items.description: Count-down-to-date timer with boxed / inline / minimal variants, a useCountdown hook, digit animation and completion content.

items.name: qr-code
items.title: QR Code
items.description: Dependency-free QR code generator rendering crisp SVG, with L/M/Q/H error correction, quiet-zone control and currentColor theming.

items.name: calendar-heatmap
items.title: Calendar Heatmap
items.description: GitHub-style contribution heatmap with month and weekday labels, tooltips, configurable intensity scale and a legend.

items.name: code-block
items.title: Code Block
items.description: Code display with built-in dependency-free syntax highlighting via theme tokens, line numbers, line highlights, diff gutters, copy button and collapsible max-height.

items.name: masonry
items.title: Masonry
items.description: True masonry layout that balances children into the shortest column by measured height, order-preserving, responsive, dependency-free.

items.name: audio-player
items.title: Audio Player
items.description: Composable audio player with play/pause, scrub-safe seek with buffered tint, skip, time readouts, volume and playback rate.

items.name: media-input
items.title: Media Input
items.description: Local media file picker that previews via an object URL; empty-state prompt, replace and clear, size validation. Nothing leaves the browser.

items.name: tour
items.title: Tour
items.description: Onboarding spotlight that dims the page around a target element and walks users through steps with a positioned coach-mark card.

items.name: activity-feed
items.title: Activity Feed
items.description: Avatar-led event feed with a connecting rail, actor and action lines, timestamps, quoted bodies and date dividers. Compound API.

items.name: audit-log
items.title: Audit Log
items.description: Compliance-style event log with expandable rows that reveal actor, action, status and request metadata. Compound disclosure API.

items.name: blur-reveal
items.title: Blur Reveal
items.description: Reveals content with a blur, fade and lift as it scrolls into view. Configurable delay, duration and threshold; respects reduced-motion.

items.name: text-reveal
items.title: Text Reveal
items.description: Staggered text entrance that masks and slides each word, character or line into place on scroll. Respects reduced-motion.

items.name: scroll-reveal
items.title: Scroll Reveal
items.description: Fades and slides content in from any direction as it enters the viewport. Configurable distance, delay and replay; respects reduced-motion.

items.name: spotlight-card
items.title: Spotlight Card
items.description: Card surface with a soft spotlight that tracks the cursor and fades in on hover. Built on design tokens, no hard-coded colors.

items.name: magnetic-button
items.title: Magnetic Button
items.description: Button that pulls toward the cursor and springs back on leave. Adjustable strength, asChild to wrap a link, respects reduced-motion.

items.name: cursor-glow
items.title: Cursor Glow
items.description: Ambient glow layer that follows the pointer across its container and fades when it leaves. Drop it behind heroes, grids or feature panels.

items.name: tilt-card
items.title: Tilt Card
items.description: 3D pointer tilt with optional cursor-following glare and configurable max angle, scale and perspective. Respects reduced-motion.

items.name: morphing-dialog
items.title: Morphing Dialog
items.description: A trigger card that morphs into a centered dialog via shared-layout animation, with focus trapping, scroll lock, Esc to close and reduced-motion support.

items.name: dock
items.title: Dock
items.description: macOS-style dock with cursor magnification: icons scale and spring as the pointer passes, with hover and focus labels. Built on motion.

items.name: floating-action-button
items.title: Floating Action Button
items.description: Expanding speed-dial FAB: a primary trigger that rotates open to stagger a stack of secondary actions on any side. Compound API.

items.name: floating-toolbar
items.title: Floating Toolbar
items.description: Floating pill toolbar for text selection and canvas actions, with toggle buttons, separators and labels. Position it anywhere.

items.name: split-view
items.title: Split View
items.description: Two-pane master/detail layout with a draggable divider, keyboard resize, min/max bounds and horizontal or vertical orientation. RTL-aware.

items.name: resizable-panels
items.title: Resizable Panels
items.description: Composable resizable panel groups with draggable, keyboard-accessible handles, per-panel minimums and nestable horizontal or vertical groups. RTL-aware.

items.name: inspector-panel
items.title: Inspector Panel
items.description: Design-tool inspector with a header, collapsible sections and label/control rows. Compound API for property panels and sidebars.

items.name: tenant-switcher
items.title: Tenant Switcher
items.description: Workspace, organization or project switcher for multi-tenant apps. Logo or initials, plan or role caption, grouped and searchable list, and a create action. Compound API.

items.name: kpi-grid
items.title: KPI Grid
items.description: Hairline-joined grid of KPI tiles with label, value, an up/down/flat delta chip and a dependency-free sparkline. Compound API.

items.name: quick-actions
items.title: Quick Actions
items.description: Grid of dashboard shortcut tiles with icon, label and description. Each tile is a button or, via asChild, a link. Compound API.

items.name: notifications
items.title: Notifications
items.description: Notification panel with header, list, per-item media, title, description, time and an accent-cool unread marker. Compound API.

items.name: billing-card
items.title: Billing Card
items.description: Current-plan summary with price, a usage meter, billing detail rows and footer actions. Compound API for billing settings.

items.name: subscription-plans
items.title: Subscription Plans
items.description: In-app plan selector with featured and current states, a badge, feature checklist and per-plan action. Compound API.

items.name: api-keys
items.title: API Keys
items.description: API key manager with reveal/hide, copy-to-clipboard, key metadata and a create action. Compound API.

items.name: usage-dashboard
items.title: Usage Dashboard
items.description: Metered usage panel with per-resource progress bars that tint amber near the limit and red over it. Compound API.

items.name: creative-studio
items.title: Creative Studio
items.description: Dark, cinematic creative-studio landing page: a full-viewport hero with an animated backdrop and pull-up wordmark, a scroll-revealed about section, and a staggered feature-card grid. Framer Motion throughout, with a self-contained warm-cream palette.

items.name: agency-landing
items.title: Agency Landing
items.description: Bright, shader-lit agency landing page: a full-viewport hero with an animated WebGL backdrop and pill navigation, an editorial about section, a featured-work grid of autoplaying video cards, and a dark closing footer with a call to action. Built on the shaders package, with a self-contained light palette.

items.name: mindloop
items.title: Mindloop
items.description: Dark, monochrome newsletter landing page: a full-screen video hero with an inline subscribe form, an answer-engine section, scroll-revealed mission copy, a four-up feature grid and a streaming-video call to action. Framer Motion throughout, with a self-contained pure-black palette and liquid-glass accents.

items.name: portfolio
items.title: Portfolio
items.description: Dark, single-page personal portfolio: a counter loading screen, an HLS video hero with a floating nav and a cycling role line, a bento work grid, a journal list, a scroll-pinned parallax gallery with lightbox, count-up stats and a video contact footer. Self-contained dark palette, driven by GSAP and Framer Motion.

items.name: usd-halo
items.title: USD Halo
items.description: Premium fintech landing page for a stablecoin: a full-bleed video hero with a custom halo wordmark and an infinite brand marquee, a meet-the-product card grid, a backers marquee, and a use-modes split with an autoplaying video panel, closing on a dark anchor footer. Self-contained light palette.

items.name: rivr
items.title: Rivr
items.description: DeFi staking landing page for a fluid-asset protocol: a video hero on a rounded card with glass stat cards and a carved documentation corner, a metrics band, a bento feature grid, a video call to action and a light footer. Self-contained light palette, Helvetica system type, Framer Motion throughout.

items.name: velorah
items.title: Velorah
items.description: Dark, premium landing page for an electric RV brand: a full-screen video hero with liquid-glass navigation, a centered tagline, a split feature card with switchable tabs, an HLS streaming statement with a stats row, a video preorder call to action and a multi-column footer. Self-contained pure-black palette, Inter + Instrument Serif type.

items.name: asme
items.title: Asme
items.description: Dark, liquid-glass marketing landing page: a full-viewport hero with a cross-fading background video, a frosted glass pill nav and an inline email form, then scroll-revealed about, featured-video, philosophy and services sections, closing on a multi-column footer. Framer Motion throughout, with a self-contained pure-black palette and Instrument Serif accents.

items.name: nexacore
items.title: NexaCore
items.description: Light enterprise-infrastructure landing page: a floating pill navbar that shrinks on scroll, a full-screen video hero, a dark service-card grid that unfolds on hover, a chaos-versus-control split around a circular streaming video, and a four-pillar delivery staircase. Self-contained navy-and-lavender palette with multi-stop brand gradients, driven by hls.js and lucide-react.

items.name: hero-06
items.title: Hero 6
items.description: Centered personal hero: a live "available for work" badge, a serif headline with a primary-tinted emphasis span, a sub-line, a three-stat row with hairline dividers, dual rounded CTAs, and a tooltip-backed core-stack icon row framed by gradient rules. Rotated geometric border accents fade in behind it (and stay still under reduced motion).

items.name: hero-07
items.title: Hero 7
items.description: Centered hero with a word-by-word blur-in serif headline, a glass beta badge with a live dot, dual rounded CTAs, and animated beam line-art SVGs that trace the top, bottom, and both sides of the section. Respects reduced-motion.

items.name: hero-08
items.title: Hero 8
items.description: Centered hero on a framed, token-lit panel: a pill badge eyebrow, a serif headline with an italic emphasis span, sub-copy, dual CTA buttons, and a faux app-window preview below. Headline, sub-copy, and CTAs fade and rise in with staggered motion that respects reduced-motion.

items.name: testimonial-03
items.title: Testimonial 3
items.description: Centered statement quote with a serif display heading, an inline quote glyph in the corner, gradient hairline dividers, and a highlighted phrase, closed by a small mono attribution line.

items.name: cta-04
items.title: CTA 4
items.description: Centered "get in touch" CTA with a mono eyebrow, serif headline, mail button, a direct-contact line, and a row of outline social icon buttons, capped by a soft radial glow dome with a starfield speckle.

items.name: cta-05
items.title: CTA 5
items.description: Contact CTA panel with a scroll-reactive radial glow, an eyebrow badge, a word-by-word reveal headline, and two contact actions (email and call) each pairing a button with its detail line.

items.name: cta-06
items.title: CTA 6
items.description: Framed CTA banner over a tokenized gradient surface: an eyebrow label, a serif headline with an italic emphasis, short sub-copy, and a primary action button with a motion reveal.

items.name: footer-02
items.title: Footer 2
items.description: Rounded-top footer with a brand block beside a multi-column link grid. Each column caps at five links and shows a "View all" arrow when there are more. A soft radial tint sits behind the top edge, and a bottom meta row carries the copyright and secondary links.

items.name: footer-03
items.title: Footer 3
items.description: Boxed link-column footer: a two-column brand block with wordmark, blurb, and ghost social buttons, two link columns, and a divided copyright row. Sits in a soft outlined panel.

items.name: faq-05
items.title: FAQ 5
items.description: Two-column FAQ block: a mono eyebrow, serif headline and short intro sit on the start side; a single-open accordion of five questions sits on the end side, split by a vertical divider that collapses to a stacked layout on mobile.

items.name: contact-02
items.title: Contact 2
items.description: Bordered contact section with a serif header, a three-column info grid (email, location, social) using muted-fill labels and divider rules, and a "Find us online" footer of pill-shaped social links.

items.name: login-03
items.title: Login 3
items.description: Split-screen sign-in: a decorative animated-paths aside with a brand mark and a short quote, paired with a clean GitHub-only sign-in pane. A back-to-home link, mobile-collapsing layout, and token-based radial glows behind the form.

items.name: toc
items.title: Table of Contents
items.description: On-this-page navigation that tracks the active heading as you scroll and highlights it with a moving border marker. Takes a flat or nested items list, or composes from parts. Smooth scroll respects reduced-motion.

items.name: app-shell-05
items.title: App Shell 5
items.description: Inset sidebar app shell: a collapsible icon sidebar with a brand header, grouped Workspace and Tools nav (with a Beta badge), and an account menu in the footer, paired with a sticky header carrying the sidebar toggle and a breadcrumb. The inset holds a stat row and a placeholder for page content.

items.name: dashboard-06
items.title: Dashboard 6
items.description: Pipeline overview dashboard: four stat cards for success, failure, skipped, and live activity, a clickable latest-runs bar chart with a run breakdown panel, and a recent-runs list. The active-now stat uses --accent-cool for live state; every other color is a design token, so it works in light and dark.
items.docs: Charts run on recharts via the shadcn chart primitive. Give ChartContainer's parent an explicit height, and update chartConfig's keys when you swap in real data.

items.name: confirm
items.title: Confirm
items.description: Imperative confirmation dialog: a root provider plus a useConfirm hook that resolves a promise on confirm or cancel. Default or destructive tone, an optional icon, and an async confirm action with a pending spinner.

items.name: unsaved-guard
items.title: Unsaved Guard
items.description: Unsaved-changes guard: a root provider plus a useUnsavedGuard hook. Warns before reload, tab close and in-app link navigation, and returns a guard(proceed) to wrap programmatic navigation in a confirm dialog.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: TanStack-powered data table: faceted, text, range and date filters, sortable columns, column visibility, row selection and pagination, with page, sort and filters kept in the URL. One useDataTable hook drives it — pass pageCount to query server-side, or omit it to sort, filter and page a local array in memory. Ships as a folder of composable parts.
items.docs: Needs a NuqsAdapter wrapping your app (nuqs) or the URL-synced page/sort/filter state won't work. Each file keeps a "use no memo" pragma — required for TanStack Table under the React Compiler, so don't remove it.

items.name: process-01
items.title: Process 1
items.description: How-it-works section with a three-step row: each step pairs an icon badge, a Step NN label, a title and a short body, joined by a hairline connector on desktop.

items.name: feature-03
items.title: Feature 3
items.description: Bento feature grid: a large lead tile with a faux file-tree preview beside five smaller token-lit tiles, each with an icon, title and short blurb.

items.name: comparison-01
items.title: Comparison 1
items.description: Two-column us-and-them panel: a featured column of checked points beside a muted column of the usual trade-offs, split by a divider that stacks on mobile.

items.name: newsletter-01
items.title: Newsletter 1
items.description: Centered subscribe panel with an inline email form, inline validation and a success state that swaps in a confirmation once a valid address is entered.

items.name: careers-01
items.title: Careers 1
items.description: Open-roles list with department filter pills and rows that show title, department, location and type, each linking out with a hover arrow.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Radix-powered accordion primitive used by the FAQ blocks. Plus icon rotates to an X on open.

items.name: calendar-utils
items.title: Calendar Utils
items.description: Dependency-free date helpers (month grids, day math, keyboard-grid navigation) shared by date-picker and date-range-picker.

items.name: theme-emerald
items.title: Emerald theme
items.description: Emerald accent preset for the hirael palette — sets --primary, --primary-foreground and --ring for light and dark.
